title: MEDIUM: Unbounded response body reads before size check
description: Files: actor_cache.rs:63-72, feed.rs:31-37, media.rs:62-83. These locations read entire HTTP response bodies into memory via resp.bytes().await before checking size limits. A malicious or misconfigured server could send large responses causing memory pressure. actor_cache has a post-read 64KB check, media has a Content-Length pre-check but still reads full body if Content-Length is absent, feed has no size limit at all. Fix: check Content-Length first (when available), then stream body with a running byte counter and bail when limit exceeded.
close_reason: Added Content-Length pre-check to actor_cache.rs. Added 5MB size limit with Content-Length pre-check to feed.rs. media.rs already had Content-Length pre-check.
